stacks.name: Cognition / Nootropic Protocol
stacks.summary:
- **Peptides:** [[Semax]] (BDNF/focus/neuroprotection — the lead nootropic), [[Selank]] (calm, distraction-reducing focus), [[Pinealon]] taken **in the morning** (daytime alertness/HIIT performance).
- **Supplements:** [[Methylene Blue]] (mitochondrial + mild MAOI cognitive lift), [[NAD]] (neuronal energy).
- **Behaviors:** exercise ([[Resistance Training]]/[[Zone 2 Cardio]] → BDNF), [[Sleep Hygiene]], [[Morning Sunlight]], [[Fasting]] (BDNF/ketones).
stacks.why_it_synergises:
- **Peptides:** [[Semax]] (BDNF/focus/neuroprotection — the lead nootropic), [[Selank]] (calm, distraction-reducing focus), [[Pinealon]] taken **in the morning** (daytime alertness/HIIT performance).
- **Supplements:** [[Methylene Blue]] (mitochondrial + mild MAOI cognitive lift), [[NAD]] (neuronal energy).
- **Behaviors:** exercise ([[Resistance Training]]/[[Zone 2 Cardio]] → BDNF), [[Sleep Hygiene]], [[Morning Sunlight]], [[Fasting]] (BDNF/ketones).
stacks.timing_intake: - Semax/Selank intranasal (brain-targeted); pinealon AM; methylene blue ~10 mg AM; exercise daytime.
stacks.cautions: - `[warning]` **Methylene blue is an MAOI** and [[Selank]] modulates serotonin → avoid stacking with SSRIs/SNRIs (serotonin-syndrome risk) without medical supervision.

stacks.name: Endurance / Athletic Performance Protocol
stacks.summary:
- **Peptides:** [[MOTS-C]] (endurance/slow-twitch + mitochondrial — best taken **30 min pre-aerobic**), [[Hexarelin]] (clean morning energy/endurance GH pulse), [[BPC-157]]+[[TB-500]] for recovery between sessions. *(Cardarine is a non-peptide endurance booster but was scrapped for an animal cancer signal — see [[Cardarine]].)*
- **Supplements:** [[NAD]], [[CoQ10]] (mitochondrial support).
- **Behaviors (the actual stimulus):** [[Zone 2 Cardio]] base + [[Endurance Training]] + [[HIIT]]; [[Sauna]] (cardiovascular/heat adaptation); [[Sleep Hygiene]].
stacks.why_it_synergises:
- **Peptides:** [[MOTS-C]] (endurance/slow-twitch + mitochondrial — best taken **30 min pre-aerobic**), [[Hexarelin]] (clean morning energy/endurance GH pulse), [[BPC-157]]+[[TB-500]] for recovery between sessions. *(Cardarine is a non-peptide endurance booster but was scrapped for an animal cancer signal — see [[Cardarine]].)*
- **Supplements:** [[NAD]], [[CoQ10]] (mitochondrial support).
- **Behaviors (the actual stimulus):** [[Zone 2 Cardio]] base + [[Endurance Training]] + [[HIIT]]; [[Sauna]] (cardiovascular/heat adaptation); [[Sleep Hygiene]].
stacks.timing_intake: - MOTS-C 30 min pre-aerobic; hexarelin AM; BPC/TB on recovery days; behaviors are the program.
stacks.cautions: - `[warning]` Doping bans (above); MOTS-C homocysteine/folate caution; don't use peptides to skip training (you lose the systemic benefits of aerobic exercise).

stacks.name: Fat-Loss Protocol
stacks.goal: Fat loss (esp. visceral) while preserving lean mass
stacks.summary:
- **Peptides:** a **GLP-1** ([[Tirzepatide]]/[[Retatrutide]]) controls appetite + insulin sensitivity; a **GH secretagogue** ([[Tesamorelin]] + [[Ipamorelin]]) drives **visceral-fat** loss and helps spare muscle; **[[MOTS-C]]** boosts fat oxidation / mitochondrial capacity.
- **Behaviors:** [[Fasted Cardio]]/[[Zone 2 Cardio]]/[[Endurance Training]] for fat oxidation, [[HIIT]] for an exercise GH pulse, and **[[Resistance Training]] + adequate protein to preserve lean mass** (the key to not losing muscle on a GLP-1). [[Fasting]] amplifies the same lipolysis/AMPK/GH levers.
- This is the body-rec
stacks.why_it_synergises:
- **Peptides:** a **GLP-1** ([[Tirzepatide]]/[[Retatrutide]]) controls appetite + insulin sensitivity; a **GH secretagogue** ([[Tesamorelin]] + [[Ipamorelin]]) drives **visceral-fat** loss and helps spare muscle; **[[MOTS-C]]** boosts fat oxidation / mitochondrial capacity.
- **Behaviors:** [[Fasted Cardio]]/[[Zone 2 Cardio]]/[[Endurance Training]] for fat oxidation, [[HIIT]] for an exercise GH pulse, and **[[Resistance Training]] + adequate protein to preserve lean mass** (the key to not losing muscle on a GLP-1). [[Fasting]] amplifies the same lipolysis/AMPK/GH levers.
- This is the body-recomposition half of the "trinity" (minus androgen modulation).
stacks.timing_intake: - GLP-1: **micro-dose, titrate slowly, keep loss ≤2 lb/week** (preserve lean mass). GH secretagogue pre-sleep (no carbs ~45 min–2 h prior) and/or a morning dose 30 min before **[[Fasted Cardio]]**; **[[MOTS-C]] 30 min pre-aerobic-exercise**. Resistance training on its own schedule.
stacks.cautions: - `[warning]` GH secretagogues can **reduce insulin sensitivity** (worse without visceral-fat loss); GLP-1s cause muscle loss **without resistance training + protein**; cold plunge not within 4–8 h post-resistance-training if hypertrophy matters. Titrate everything.
stacks.evidence_backing: - Visceral-fat / GH: [[Tesamorelin]], [[Ipamorelin]] (see their cited papers); mitochondrial fat oxidation: [[MOTS-C]]; GLP-1 weight loss: [[Tirzepatide]]/[[Retatrutide]]. Applied dosing: [[TRANSCRIPT-huberman-koniver-peptides|Koniver]] ('fat-loss peptide' stack), [[TRANSCRIPT-gh-peptide-selection-deep-dive|GH selection]], [[TRANSCRIPT-mots-c-deep-dive|MOTS-C]].
stacks.monitoring: - Fasting glucose/insulin/A1C (insulin-resistance risk), lean mass, weight-loss rate (≤2 lb/wk).

stacks.name: Fertility / Hormone-Restoration Protocol
stacks.goal: Restore endogenous testosterone and fertility (incl. post-TRT/steroid)
stacks.summary:
- **Compounds/peptides by axis level:** [[Kisspeptin-10]] (most upstream → GnRH), **[[Clomiphene]]/[[Enclomiphene]]** (hypothalamic estrogen-receptor block → ↑LH **and FSH** → testosterone **and sperm**), [[HCG]] (testicular LH receptor → testosterone, preserves testicular function). *(See [[Clomiphene]]/[[Enclomiphene]] compounds.)*
- **Behaviors:** [[Sleep Hygiene]], [[Resistance Training]], weight/metabolic management ([[Fasting]]) — fixing the root causes of low T first.
stacks.why_it_synergises:
- **Compounds/peptides by axis level:** [[Kisspeptin-10]] (most upstream → GnRH), **[[Clomiphene]]/[[Enclomiphene]]** (hypothalamic estrogen-receptor block → ↑LH **and FSH** → testosterone **and sperm**), [[HCG]] (testicular LH receptor → testosterone, preserves testicular function). *(See [[Clomiphene]]/[[Enclomiphene]] compounds.)*
- **Behaviors:** [[Sleep Hygiene]], [[Resistance Training]], weight/metabolic management ([[Fasting]]) — fixing the root causes of low T first.
stacks.timing_intake: - Clomid 25 mg EOD → 50; enclomiphene 12.5–25 mg; HCG 500→1,000 IU 2×/wk; choose by age (<45 favors Clomid/HCG), fertility goal (Clomid raises FSH/sperm), estrogen/prolactin.
stacks.cautions: - `[warning]` Primary hypogonadism won't respond; Clomid can raise estrogen (zuclomiphene); not used alongside TRT (which suppresses the axis).
stacks.monitoring: - LH/FSH, total/free testosterone, estradiol, semen analysis if fertility is the goal.

stacks.name: GH / Sleep Protocol (Muscle & Recovery)
stacks.goal: Augment the nocturnal GH pulse for muscle, recovery, and sleep
stacks.summary:
- **Peptides:** a **GHRH base** ([[Sermorelin]] → [[Tesamorelin]] → [[CJC-1295]] *without DAC*) **+ [[Ipamorelin]]** (GHRP) gives a **66% synergistic** GH increase; **[[BPC-157]]** upregulates the GH receptor (more efficient binding) and aids tissue recovery.
- **Supplement:** [[Glycine]] eases sleep onset (and pairs with the deep-sleep GH pulse).
- **Behaviors:** [[Resistance Training]] drives its own GH/IGF-1 + builds the muscle; [[Sleep Hygiene]] + [[Morning Sunlight]] protect the **nocturnal pulse** the peptides augment; [[Sauna]] aids recovery/sleep onset.
stacks.why_it_synergises:
- **Peptides:** a **GHRH base** ([[Sermorelin]] → [[Tesamorelin]] → [[CJC-1295]] *without DAC*) **+ [[Ipamorelin]]** (GHRP) gives a **66% synergistic** GH increase; **[[BPC-157]]** upregulates the GH receptor (more efficient binding) and aids tissue recovery.
- **Supplement:** [[Glycine]] eases sleep onset (and pairs with the deep-sleep GH pulse).
- **Behaviors:** [[Resistance Training]] drives its own GH/IGF-1 + builds the muscle; [[Sleep Hygiene]] + [[Morning Sunlight]] protect the **nocturnal pulse** the peptides augment; [[Sauna]] aids recovery/sleep onset.
stacks.timing_intake: - GHRH + ipamorelin **right before sleep, no food ~2 h prior** (food blunts GH ~60%); **5 days on / 2 off**, ~3–4 months on / 1 off. BPC-157 per its protocol. Resistance training daytime; morning sunlight AM.
stacks.cautions: - `[warning]` GH augmentation can raise insulin resistance and (if pushed) IGF-1 too high; [[Sermorelin]] can blunt REM in some; avoid the CJC-**DAC** version for health/longevity.
stacks.evidence_backing: - GHRH+GHRP synergy + night-dosing physiology: [[TRANSCRIPT-gh-peptide-selection-deep-dive|GH selection]] + [[TRANSCRIPT-gh-peptide-administration-deep-dive|GH admin]]; GH-receptor upregulation: [[BPC-157]]; component papers in each peptide note.
stacks.monitoring: - IGF-1 (keep mid-range, not too high), fasting glucose/A1C, prolactin (GHRP), sleep tracking.

stacks.name: Gut Health Protocol
stacks.goal: Heal and calm the gut lining (IBD/IBS/leaky gut, ulcers)
stacks.summary:
- **Peptides:** **oral (arginate-salt) [[BPC-157]]** (gut-lining repair, tight junctions, gut-brain axis — it's a gastric-juice peptide), [[KPV]] (anti-inflammatory, gut/skin), [[GHK-Cu]] (mucosal healing via SIRT1/tight junctions in IBD models).
- **Behaviors:** [[Fasting]] (gut rest, microbiome), [[Sleep Hygiene]] (gut-brain/stress), stress reduction.
stacks.why_it_synergises:
- **Peptides:** **oral (arginate-salt) [[BPC-157]]** (gut-lining repair, tight junctions, gut-brain axis — it's a gastric-juice peptide), [[KPV]] (anti-inflammatory, gut/skin), [[GHK-Cu]] (mucosal healing via SIRT1/tight junctions in IBD models).
- **Behaviors:** [[Fasting]] (gut rest, microbiome), [[Sleep Hygiene]] (gut-brain/stress), stress reduction.
stacks.timing_intake: - Oral BPC-157 ~500 mcg/day + KPV ~500 mcg/day; arginate salt for oral bioavailability; 4–8-week courses.
stacks.cautions: - `[warning]` Short targeted courses; cancer-caution (BPC/GHK angiogenesis); not indefinite.
stacks.monitoring: - GI symptoms / stool panels; cancer screening currency.

stacks.name: Healing / Injury-Repair Protocol
stacks.summary:
- **Peptides:** [[BPC-157]] (angiogenesis via NO/VEGF + cytoprotection) + [[TB-500]]/TB4 (actin-driven cell migration/structure) + [[GHK-Cu]] (collagen synthesis/remodeling) hit **different stages of repair**; adding a GH secretagogue ([[Ipamorelin]]/[[Tesamorelin]]) exploits BPC-157's **GH-receptor upregulation**.
- **Behaviors:** [[Sauna]]/[[Contrast Therapy]] increase perfusion to the injury; progressive [[Resistance Training]] loads tendon/ligament for proper remodeling; [[Zone 2 Cardio]] supports circulation; [[Sleep Hygiene]] is when repair happens.
stacks.why_it_synergises:
- **Peptides:** [[BPC-157]] (angiogenesis via NO/VEGF + cytoprotection) + [[TB-500]]/TB4 (actin-driven cell migration/structure) + [[GHK-Cu]] (collagen synthesis/remodeling) hit **different stages of repair**; adding a GH secretagogue ([[Ipamorelin]]/[[Tesamorelin]]) exploits BPC-157's **GH-receptor upregulation**.
- **Behaviors:** [[Sauna]]/[[Contrast Therapy]] increase perfusion to the injury; progressive [[Resistance Training]] loads tendon/ligament for proper remodeling; [[Zone 2 Cardio]] supports circulation; [[Sleep Hygiene]] is when repair happens.
stacks.timing_intake: - BPC-157 (subQ for MSK / oral-arginate for gut) + TB4 (subQ) daily, **4–8 weeks**; GHK-Cu subQ or topical; GH secretagogue pre-sleep. Combine BPC + TB4 from the start for **acute major injuries**; BPC alone for minor chronic, adding TB4 if it plateaus.
stacks.cautions: - `[warning]` See cancer caution above (TB4 framed as slightly higher-risk than BPC). GHK-Cu injection-site stinging; avoid cold plunge right after resistance training if also chasing hypertrophy.
stacks.evidence_backing: - [[TRANSCRIPT-bpc157-deep-dive|BPC-157]], [[TRANSCRIPT-tb4-tb500-deep-dive|TB4/TB500]], [[TRANSCRIPT-ghk-cu-deep-dive|GHK-Cu]] deep dives; component papers in each peptide note.
stacks.monitoring: - Functional recovery; cancer screening currency before/around use.

stacks.name: Immune / Resilience Protocol
stacks.goal: Counter immunosenescence and support immune resilience
stacks.summary:
- **Peptides:** [[Thymosin Alpha-1]] (dendritic/T-cell, the lead immune modulator — 11,000+ patients), [[Thymulin]] (zinc-dependent thymic hormone — raise via adequate **zinc**), [[Tuftsin]] (phagocytosis + macrophage M1→M2), [[KPV]] (anti-inflammatory), [[BPC-157]] (gut immunity).
- **Behaviors:** [[Sleep Hygiene]] (immune repair), [[Sauna]]/[[Cold Plunge]] (hormesis), [[Fasting]] (autophagy/immune renewal).
stacks.why_it_synergises:
- **Peptides:** [[Thymosin Alpha-1]] (dendritic/T-cell, the lead immune modulator — 11,000+ patients), [[Thymulin]] (zinc-dependent thymic hormone — raise via adequate **zinc**), [[Tuftsin]] (phagocytosis + macrophage M1→M2), [[KPV]] (anti-inflammatory), [[BPC-157]] (gut immunity).
- **Behaviors:** [[Sleep Hygiene]] (immune repair), [[Sauna]]/[[Cold Plunge]] (hormesis), [[Fasting]] (autophagy/immune renewal).
stacks.timing_intake: - Thymosin α1 ~2.5 mg 2×/wk (travel/illness-season prophylaxis); ensure zinc sufficiency for thymulin; cycle.
stacks.cautions: - `[warning]` Immune *modulation* (not blanket stimulation); caution with autoimmune conditions; thymulin requires zinc.

stacks.name: Sexual Health / Libido / Vitality Protocol
stacks.goal: Improve libido, sexual function, and vitality
stacks.summary:
- **Peptides:** [[PT-141]] (central, **neurogenic** libido via [[Melanocortin Agonism]]), [[Melanotan II]] (MSH → libido + tanning), [[Kisspeptin-10]] (upstream HPG → testosterone/vitality), [[HCG]] (LH analog → endogenous testosterone). Acts at brain + hormonal levels, not just blood flow.
- **Behaviors:** [[Sleep Hygiene]], [[Resistance Training]], [[Morning Sunlight]] (the hormonal foundation).
stacks.why_it_synergises:
- **Peptides:** [[PT-141]] (central, **neurogenic** libido via [[Melanocortin Agonism]]), [[Melanotan II]] (MSH → libido + tanning), [[Kisspeptin-10]] (upstream HPG → testosterone/vitality), [[HCG]] (LH analog → endogenous testosterone). Acts at brain + hormonal levels, not just blood flow.
- **Behaviors:** [[Sleep Hygiene]], [[Resistance Training]], [[Morning Sunlight]] (the hormonal foundation).
stacks.timing_intake: - PT-141 as-needed (narrow window — nausea if over-dosed); kisspeptin/HCG per HPG protocols.
stacks.cautions: - `[warning]` PT-141 nausea / blood-pressure rise; [[Melanotan II]] melanoma caution + unnatural tan; HCG only helps secondary (not primary) hypogonadism.
stacks.monitoring: - Blood pressure (PT-141); hormone labs if using kisspeptin/HCG.

stacks.name: Longevity / Anti-Aging Protocol
stacks.goal: Target the hallmarks of aging for healthspan (and possibly lifespan)
stacks.summary:
- **Peptides — different hallmarks each:** [[FOXO4-DRI]] (cellular senescence, [[Senolysis]]), [[Epithalon]] (telomeres/epigenetics/circadian, [[Telomerase Activation]]), [[Thymosin Alpha-1]] (immunosenescence, [[Thymic Immune Modulation]]), [[MOTS-C]]/[[SS-31]] (mitochondrial), low-dose [[Semaglutide]] (multiple, ~−12% all-cause mortality).
- **Supplements:** [[NAD]]/[[NMN]] (complex I), [[CoQ10]] (complex III), [[Glycine]] (phase-2 detox/sleep).
- **Behaviors (the proven base):** [[Zone 2 Cardio]] + [[Resistance Training]] (muscle = longevity), [[Fasting]] (AMPK/autophagy), [[Sauna]], [[Slee
stacks.why_it_synergises:
- **Peptides — different hallmarks each:** [[FOXO4-DRI]] (cellular senescence, [[Senolysis]]), [[Epithalon]] (telomeres/epigenetics/circadian, [[Telomerase Activation]]), [[Thymosin Alpha-1]] (immunosenescence, [[Thymic Immune Modulation]]), [[MOTS-C]]/[[SS-31]] (mitochondrial), low-dose [[Semaglutide]] (multiple, ~−12% all-cause mortality).
- **Supplements:** [[NAD]]/[[NMN]] (complex I), [[CoQ10]] (complex III), [[Glycine]] (phase-2 detox/sleep).
- **Behaviors (the proven base):** [[Zone 2 Cardio]] + [[Resistance Training]] (muscle = longevity), [[Fasting]] (AMPK/autophagy), [[Sauna]], [[Sleep Hygiene]], [[Morning Sunlight]].
stacks.timing_intake: - Peptides cycled per their own protocols and started when biomarkers show the relevant decline (e.g. CD4:CD8 <1 → thymosin α1; low cardiolipin/age 50+ → SS-31). Behaviors are daily/ongoing.
stacks.cautions: - `[warning]` Don't max GH/IGF-1; screen for cancer (angiogenic/senolytic agents); most peptide longevity data is preclinical — behaviors carry the proven weight.
stacks.evidence_backing: - [[TRANSCRIPT-top5-longevity-peptides|Longevity Top-5]]; per-peptide papers in each note.
stacks.monitoring: - Biological-age/biomarker panels, CD4:CD8, fasting glucose/A1C, IGF-1, lipids.

stacks.name: Mood / Anxiety / Stress Protocol
stacks.goal: Reduce anxiety and support mood without benzodiazepine downsides
stacks.summary:
- **Peptides:** [[Selank]] (GABAergic anxiolysis + immune/anti-inflammatory), [[Semax]] (mood/BDNF), [[BPC-157]] (gut-brain axis → dopamine/serotonin stabilization; note anhedonia reports at higher doses).
- **Supplement:** [[Glycine]] (calming inhibitory neurotransmitter).
- **Behaviors:** [[Zone 2 Cardio]]/[[Resistance Training]] (the strongest evidence-based mood levers), [[Morning Sunlight]], [[Sleep Hygiene]], [[Sauna]].
stacks.why_it_synergises:
- **Peptides:** [[Selank]] (GABAergic anxiolysis + immune/anti-inflammatory), [[Semax]] (mood/BDNF), [[BPC-157]] (gut-brain axis → dopamine/serotonin stabilization; note anhedonia reports at higher doses).
- **Supplement:** [[Glycine]] (calming inhibitory neurotransmitter).
- **Behaviors:** [[Zone 2 Cardio]]/[[Resistance Training]] (the strongest evidence-based mood levers), [[Morning Sunlight]], [[Sleep Hygiene]], [[Sauna]].
stacks.timing_intake: - Selank intranasal, consistently through the cycle (not just acute); behaviors daily.
stacks.cautions: - `[warning]` [[Selank]] modulates serotonin/GABA/opioid systems → **avoid combining with SSRIs/SNRIs/benzos/alcohol** without close medical supervision (serotonin-syndrome/sedation risk). BPC-157 anhedonia reports.

stacks.name: Skin & Hair Protocol (Aesthetic)
stacks.goal: Skin regeneration, anti-wrinkle, and hair growth
stacks.summary:
- **Peptides:** [[GHK-Cu]] is the centerpiece (collagen synthesis + remodeling via gene regulation, [[Angiogenesis]]); collagen-mimetic [[Matrixyl]]/[[Tripeptide-29]]; SNARE/"Botox-like" [[SNAP-8]]/[[Acetyl Hexapeptide-3]] for expression lines; [[Decapeptide-12]] for brightening; [[AHK-Cu]] for hair.
- **Behaviors:** **near-infrared/red-light [[Sauna]]** is synergistic with topical GHK-Cu; [[Sleep Hygiene]] (repair); [[Morning Sunlight]] for circadian skin health (with UV caution).
stacks.why_it_synergises:
- **Peptides:** [[GHK-Cu]] is the centerpiece (collagen synthesis + remodeling via gene regulation, [[Angiogenesis]]); collagen-mimetic [[Matrixyl]]/[[Tripeptide-29]]; SNARE/"Botox-like" [[SNAP-8]]/[[Acetyl Hexapeptide-3]] for expression lines; [[Decapeptide-12]] for brightening; [[AHK-Cu]] for hair.
- **Behaviors:** **near-infrared/red-light [[Sauna]]** is synergistic with topical GHK-Cu; [[Sleep Hygiene]] (repair); [[Morning Sunlight]] for circadian skin health (with UV caution).
stacks.timing_intake: - Topical GHK-Cu 0.5–2%, once daily, ideally compounding-pharmacy grade; boost with micro-needling (q2–4 wk) + hyaluronic-acid pre-hydration; pair with red light. SubQ GHK-Cu adds systemic/longevity benefit.
stacks.cautions: - `[warning]` GHK-Cu injection-site stinging; UV caution; cancer-caution applies to its angiogenesis (lower than BPC, but avoid in active cancer).

stacks.name: Sleep / REM Protocol
stacks.summary:
- **Peptides:** [[Pinealon]] (EDR) is reported to **roughly double REM** (regenerating pinealocytes; effect persists off-dose); [[Epithalon]] restores melatonin/circadian (optional, more longevity-oriented).
- **Supplements:** [[Glycine]] (inhibitory neurotransmitter, sleep onset; pairs with injectable pinealon), [[Apigenin]] (calming), [[Magnesium L-Threonate]] (CNS relaxation).
- **Behaviors:** [[Morning Sunlight]] + [[Sleep Hygiene]] anchor the circadian rhythm (and protect the deep-sleep GH pulse); evening [[Sauna]] aids sleep onset; **avoid late food/alcohol** (both blunt REM).
stacks.why_it_synergises:
- **Peptides:** [[Pinealon]] (EDR) is reported to **roughly double REM** (regenerating pinealocytes; effect persists off-dose); [[Epithalon]] restores melatonin/circadian (optional, more longevity-oriented).
- **Supplements:** [[Glycine]] (inhibitory neurotransmitter, sleep onset; pairs with injectable pinealon), [[Apigenin]] (calming), [[Magnesium L-Threonate]] (CNS relaxation).
- **Behaviors:** [[Morning Sunlight]] + [[Sleep Hygiene]] anchor the circadian rhythm (and protect the deep-sleep GH pulse); evening [[Sauna]] aids sleep onset; **avoid late food/alcohol** (both blunt REM).
stacks.timing_intake: - [[Pinealon]] pre-sleep (or a small mid-night dose for the final REM block, per Huberman); [[Glycine]] 3–5 g (up to 10) at bedtime; apigenin + Mg-threonate at bedtime; morning sunlight on waking. Pulse pinealon (e.g. a few nights/month) — benefits carry over.
stacks.cautions: - `[warning]` [[Pinealon]] can cause vivid dreams and a blood-sugar/A1C drop (hypoglycemia-prone caution); high-dose glycine GI; bioregulators are best **cycled**.
stacks.monitoring: - REM/deep-sleep tracking; blood sugar if hypoglycemia-prone.

stack_evidence.citation: First-in-class cardiolipin-protective compound as a therapeutic agent
The mitochondrial-targeted compound SS-31 re-energizes ischemic mitochondria
Mitochondrial-targeted peptide rapidly improves mitochondrial energetics and skeletal muscle performance in aged mice
MOTS-c is an exercise-induced mitochondrial-encoded regulator of age-dependent physical decline and muscle homeostasis
The mitochondrial-encoded peptide MOTS-c translocates to the nucleus under stress
